name: Twisted Vee - Dandy's World
description:
Twisted Vee, Vee, full name Vee Version 1 or Vee V1 is One of the Main Characters of Gardenview Center.

This Twisted has eyes everywhere, messing up Machines would not be advised. She will also attempt to distract Toons with worthless ads and pop-ups while she goes for the kill.

Twisted Vee is a large, Roaming Twisted that wanders the halls aimlessly. Reflecting her media personality counterpart, her unique ability allows her to bombard players with popup Advertisements, which need to be closed by clicking the red "X" button in the top right of the pop-up window, or else they block the view of the player's screen. Xbox players are able to press the B button to close the pop-ups as well. She will send these popup ADs to all players upon entering the Floor and every 45 seconds afterwards in groups of three. They pose no direct threat, and besides their tendency to cover skill checks, it's relatively harmless, though they are still relatively harmless and pose no threat beyond their ability to block the player's vision. She creates can make her hard to escape, and her usage makes it much harder for any Toons to attempt Distracting her.

Vee's footsteps are mechanical in nature. She will additionally make agitated, electronic noises when spotting a Toon.

Escaping Twisted Vee during a chase is no easy task, especially while using slower Toons such as Vee herself or Rodger. One way to get rid of her is to run around rooms in the map instead of circling boxes as you would with any other Twisteds. Finding space to get a large distance between you and Twisted Vee will make your escape a lot easier. Once you are a few rooms away from her, it's usually safe to duck behind boxes.

Twisted Vee's presence is usually easy to notice, as her appearance doesn't blend in with most maps (in contrast to some Twisteds like Twisted Finn) and her footsteps are easy to hear and distinguish from other Main Characters Twisteds' footsteps. She should be relatively easy to avoid getting chased by so long as you're Stealthy.

An Eject Button helps a lot when you encounter Twisted Vee if you wish to escape from her.

To handle Twisted Vee's pop-ups, close the player menu on the side of the screen as pop-ups can spawn there and you may not be able to close them out. Be especially careful while you are being chased by a Twisted or doing a machine. When doing a machine, you may get pop-ups and fail the skill check. Paired with Twisted Vee's ability to go to a failed machine from anywhere, if you aren't prepared, this can be deadly. If you are being chased and pop-ups appear, you may run into several walls, allowing the Twisted to hit you. Always be ready to close out Twisted Vee's pop-ups otherwise you may face a early demise.
creator: _______CleaningHalls
